ICICI Lombard Elevate vs. Star Health Super Star Plan: Are You Making the Right Choice?

ICICI LOMBARD ELEVATE VIDEO- https://youtu.be/0JusqkZ1x5I
STAR SUPER STAR VIDEO- https://youtu.be/NIzSapEv9KA

#healthinsurance #insuranceimpact #insuranceagency #insuranceagents #insuranceagent #harvindersingh #sbigeneral #mediclaim #healthinsuranceplan 

Nowadays it’s very challenging to choose the best health insurance policy for family or ourselves. The reason is so many choices among health insurance plans. The best way to choose the best health insurance policy in India in 2024 is to compare plans and then decide.

So In today’s video we will compare the Top 2 Latest Health Insurance Plans of 2024 in India:

1. ICICU Lombard Elevate Health Insurance plan &
2. Star Health Insurance Super Star Plan.

Which Plan has more Features and benefits among Icici Lombard elevate and star health super star plan?

What are different addons  Offered in Star Health Super star plan?

Can We Port or Migrate to ICICI Lombard Elevate health Insurance Policy?

How is star health insurance Super star policy different than other star health Insurance plans?

What are the different optional covers in ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance Policy?

What are the different waiting period in ICICI Lombard Elevate Policy and Star Health Insurance super star Policy?

Is star Super Star Plan affordable than Icici Elevate Health Plan?

This video is going to be the ultimate comparison of these 2 best health Insurance plans in India. Star health Super star plan and ICICI Lombard Elevate Health Insurance.

SO don’t miss the information.

CHAPTERS:

comments.text: Some tomes agent says they are porting it but when portability is not there which is a later surprise to them what they do is silently creates new policy without informing you, pls keep right question and record it properly so that u can cancel on the basis of conversation that also in some limited period. I went through same situation, cross checked agent multiple times about porting for one of the policy, at the last moment they disclosed saying porting they can't do.  Important ones pls question multiple times, most agents are half knowledge people, they say yes to everything, at the end when application getting filled if u ask for that option then they don't what to say and also applications should be filled infront of you, u needs to check that properly, they fool you, while going for a policy we are interacting with illiterate agents keep in mind.
